description: Accumulator of accounts (companies) for activation. Each account aggregates signals seen across all axes and weeks. Updated weekly by the activation routine. An account only generates a proposal when it crosses a threshold (see _playbook.md). Comment fields below document the shape.

_account_shape.account: nome canonico da empresa (entidade resolvida entre eixos)
_account_shape.fit: alto | medio | baixo (resultado do fit floor / ICP)

signals.axis: eixo de origem (ex: markets/<mercado>, competitors, official-records)
signals.signal: tipo de sinal (ex: fundraising, hiring-tech, novo-registro)
signals.week: AAAA-WXX em que o sinal apareceu

_account_shape.score: numero, resultado de Fit x Intencao x Recencia x Stack
_account_shape.cluster: rotulo do agrupamento de sinais (ex: 'expansao', 'troca de fornecedor')
_account_shape.last_seen_week: AAAA-WXX da ultima vez que a conta teve sinal
_account_shape.proposed_week: AAAA-WXX em que virou proposta (null se ainda nao)
